title: What We Do
subtitle: Six disciplines. One mission: make you harder to compromise.

items.title: Security Assessment & Penetration Testing
items.desc: Simulated adversary operations exposing vulnerabilities across web, mobile, API, and network layers before real attackers do.

items.title: Security Operations & Hardening
items.desc: SIEM deployment, endpoint hardening, access control, and incident response frameworks that keep your perimeter solid.

items.title: GRC & ISO 27001 Compliance
items.desc: End-to-end governance, risk, and compliance implementation including audit readiness, policy development, and regulatory alignment.

items.title: Awareness & Skill Development
items.desc: Phishing simulations, tabletop exercises, and security culture programs that turn your people into a human firewall.

items.title: Network & Infrastructure Security
items.desc: Secure network design, Zero Trust architecture, and hardened infrastructure built for resilience and scale.

items.title: Digital Forensics & Incident Response
items.desc: Rapid containment, root-cause investigation, and evidence preservation for breaches and security incidents.
